default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and technical implementation details.](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [UTM tracking on internal links can disrupt GA data; event tracking via GTM recommended instead](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Recent traffic spike from translation-related content normalized; focus on consistent growth and user engagement](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Potential keyword cannibalization identified; team to review and optimize overlapping content](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Experimenting with longer meta titles may improve CTR, but requires careful monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Topics

### UTM Tracking and Analytics Implementation

  - [UTM parameters on internal links can create self-referring sessions, disrupting Google Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Recommended solution: Use event tracking via Google Tag Manager for internal link clicks](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Create a taxonomy: e.g., "CTA button click" \> "white paper" \> "specific white paper name"](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Jessica to investigate GTM implementation for tracking banner and resource page interactions](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Team to consider leveraging HubSpot for additional tracking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Content Performance and SEO Strategy

  - [Overall performance for refreshed content doubled; slight drop in new article performance (4 published last week)](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [One refreshed article on translation costs saw temporary spike in impressions/clicks, now normalizing](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Strategy for maintaining growth:](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
      - [Focus on consistent publishing of new content](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [Improve user experience (CTAs, images)](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
      - [Target achievable, lower-volume topics for steady momentum](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Planned content clusters: enterprise-related, personal cell phone use, legal text messaging](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Explore expanding translation-related content to align with Yourco's multilingual team focus](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Keyword Cannibalization

  - [Potential issue identified with two articles on non-desk employee communications](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Team to review and consider:](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [Expanding content to differentiate topics](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [Refreshing content to focus on unique queries](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Possibly redirecting one article to the other](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Jessica to send list of other potentially cannibalizing articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Meta Titles and URLs

  - [Discussed optimizing long meta titles (aim for \~70 characters)](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Recent industry discussions suggest longer titles may improve CTR in some cases](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Agreed to experiment with shorter titles while monitoring performance](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Will adjust titles only, not URLs, to avoid unnecessary SEO friction](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to provide detailed guidance on event tracking implementation via GTM](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Sadira to prepare cluster-based analysis report in Looker Studio for next week](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team to review and optimize potentially cannibalizing content, starting with non-desk communication articles](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Jessica to send list of other articles for cannibalization review](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Experiment with optimizing meta titles for length and monitor performance](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Continue focus on consistent content publishing and user experience improvements](https://fathom.video/share/CSkyEptJV2dNo7KCvXEgsFznm22rA6C2?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

action_items.description: Investigate using Google Tag Manager for event tracking instead of UTMs
Check and provide GA4 access to Sadira
Investigate keyword cannibalization for non-desk employee communication articles
Send list of articles with potential keyword cannibalization to Sadira
